_comment: VG-01 High Society — symbol skin mapping. Maps engine symbol IDs to VG-01 PNG assets. Engine IDs are numeric (0-11) matching the slot-engine symbol index. This mapping is used ONLY by the renderer layer; it does not alter symbol weights, paylines, or outcomes.
title: High Society

_notes.safe: This file is renderer-only. Engine symbol IDs, paylines, weights, and outcomes are untouched.
_notes.fallback: If a symbol ID is not found in this map, the renderer falls back to the 'fallback' filename.
_notes.sizing: All PNGs are 2048x2048px square with transparent backgrounds. Rendered at 100% width of the reel cell.
